overrides.override_summary: Post-term noncompete likely unenforceable under CA Business & Professions Code §16600
overrides.why_it_matters: CA Licensee may freely operate competing chicken business after license ends

overrides.override_summary: Cannot require out-of-state litigation for CA residents per CA Corporations Code §20040.5
overrides.why_it_matters: CA Licensee can litigate in California instead of Georgia

overrides.override_summary: CA Business & Professions Code §20000-20043 provides non-renewal/transfer/termination rights
overrides.why_it_matters: Additional protections beyond what the License Agreement provides

overrides.override_summary: 90 days notice of termination; 180 days notice of non-renewal
overrides.why_it_matters: HI Licensee gets significantly more notice before losing the license

overrides.override_summary: Illinois Franchise Disclosure Act §705/19-20 applies to termination/transfer
overrides.why_it_matters: IL provides additional franchisee protections on termination

overrides.override_summary: Indiana Deceptive Franchise Practices Act IC 23-2-2.7 provides termination/non-renewal/transfer protections
overrides.why_it_matters: IN Licensee has state-law protections on franchise relationship

overrides.override_summary: CFA must provide 90 days notice of termination with 60 days to cure
overrides.why_it_matters: MD Licensee has more time to cure defaults before termination

overrides.override_summary: General release as condition of renewal may not be enforceable
overrides.why_it_matters: MD Licensee cannot be forced to waive claims as price of renewal

overrides.override_summary: 90 days notice of termination (60 days to cure); 180 days notice of non-renewal
overrides.why_it_matters: Significantly more time for MN Licensee

overrides.override_summary: Consent to transfer not to be unreasonably withheld
overrides.why_it_matters: MN limits CFA's absolute discretion on transfer approval

overrides.override_summary: Noncompete enforcement limited per MN franchise law
overrides.why_it_matters: MN Licensee may have more freedom post-termination

overrides.override_summary: CFA must defend Licensee against third-party trademark infringement claims at CFA's cost if Licensee used marks properly
overrides.why_it_matters: MN shifts trademark defense cost to CFA

overrides.override_summary: Forum selection limited — cannot require out-of-state litigation for NY residents asserting NY franchise law claims
overrides.why_it_matters: NY Licensee can litigate NY franchise claims in New York

overrides.override_summary: CFA cannot require waiver of rights under NY General Business Law
overrides.why_it_matters: NY franchise law rights are non-waivable

overrides.override_summary: Noncompete may not be enforceable per ND law
overrides.why_it_matters: ND Licensee may freely compete post-termination

overrides.override_summary: ND law governs for ND claims
overrides.why_it_matters: ND law applies instead of Georgia law for ND-specific claims

overrides.override_summary: General release not required as condition of renewal/transfer
overrides.why_it_matters: ND Licensee cannot be forced to waive claims

overrides.override_summary: Wisconsin Fair Dealership Law Ch. 135 applies — additional termination protections
overrides.why_it_matters: WI provides some of the strongest franchisee termination protections
